risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Constraining Project Effectiveness
risk_summary: The project remains not effective as of February 2025, over 7 months after the planned effectiveness date of September 23, 2024. Political and governance risks are rated 'High' and persistent, directly impacting the project's ability to become operational and begin implementation activities.
evidence_quote: The GATE project is not effective yet.

risk_summary: Lebanon's macroeconomic risk is rated 'High' at approval and remains 'High' in the current assessment. This persistent high macroeconomic risk in a fragile state context threatens the viability of project activities, particularly SME lending and farmer investments in an economically unstable environment.
evidence_quote: Risk Category Rating at Approval Approval Package - 28 Jun 2023 Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 02 - 04 Jul 2024 Proposed Rating... Macroeconomic High High High

risk_title: Fiduciary Risk in Fragile Governance Context
risk_summary: Fiduciary risk is rated 'High' and persistent across all assessment periods. In Lebanon's fragile political and governance environment, this elevated fiduciary risk poses significant threats to fund management, procurement integrity, and financial accountability in project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category Rating at Approval Approval Package - 28 Jun 2023 Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 02 - 04 Jul 2024 Proposed Rating... Fiduciary High High High

risk_title: Zero Implementation Progress Amid FCV Context
risk_summary: Despite project approval in June 2023, all PDO and intermediate result indicators show zero actual progress as of January 2025. No farmers have adopted technologies, no SME loans have been approved, no infrastructure has been constructed, and no training has been delivered. This complete implementation stall reflects the constraining effects of Lebanon's political instability and governance fragility.
evidence_quote: Actual (Current) Value Date Value 16-Jan-2025 0 [across all indicators: Number of farmers adopting climate-smart agricultural technologies, Number of SME loans approved, Length of rural roads rehabilitated, etc.]
